payload.title: Relay Bridge Smoke — v0.2.0-rc.1
payload.body:
This task was injected via relay-bridge from wscat (simulating PWA/phone). If you see this in the CodeFlow governance loop, relay-bridge is working.

Expected: InboxWatcher picks up TASK-*.md written by relay-bridge.ts, governance loop runs, task_event is emitted back through relay to this wscat session.
